items.title: Pope prioritises world's fastest-growing Catholic region in major Africa tour
items.dek: Leo XIV wants the world's attention on a continent vital to the Church's future, an aide says.

items.title: Frostbite is least of worries for Canada forces grappling with new Arctic reality
items.dek: Across 5,200 km of Canada's Arctic, some 1,300 members of Canada's military spent two winter months on a mission to meet the challenges of a changing north.
items.body: Across 5,200 km of Canada's Arctic, some 1,300 members of Canada's military spent two winter months on a mission to meet the challenges of a changing north.
